story: Cardi B made music history on July 3, 2018. The talented rapper became the first woman in her genre to score two number-one hits on the US Billboard chart. Her catchy song 'I Like It', featuring Bad Bunny and J Balvin, climbed to the top spot. This achievement proved Cardi B was a force to be reckoned with in the music world.
activity_question: What song helped Cardi B make history?
follow_up_question: Can you name another female rapper who has topped the charts?

title: A Musical Pioneer's Birthday
story: Ruth Crawford Seeger burst onto the music scene with a unique sound. Born in East Liverpool, Ohio on July 3, 1901, she became a trailblazing composer. Seeger blended classical and folk styles, creating pieces like her famous String Quartet in 1931. Her work 'Rissolty, Rossolty' showcased her talent for mixing traditional tunes with modern twists.
activity_question: What type of music did Ruth Crawford Seeger compose?
follow_up_question: Can you name one of Ruth Crawford Seeger's famous compositions mentioned in the story?

title: A Salsa Star is Born
story: Cheo Feliciano, a musical legend, entered the world on July 3, 1935. Born in Ponce, Puerto Rico, he grew up to become a celebrated salsa and bolero singer. Cheo's powerful voice graced famous bands like the Joe Cuba Sextet and Eddie Palmieri Orchestra. Beyond music, he used his fame to speak out against drugs, inspiring many.
activity_question: What type of music was Cheo Feliciano known for?
bonus_fact: Cheo means 'Joe' in Puerto Rican slang, so his stage name was like saying 'Joe Feliciano'!
